---
title: "Figure 4 – Cell crosstalk"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup}
library(CellChat)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)

pA <- Heatmap(cellchat_magma_matrix)
pA

netVisual_circle(cellchat_obj)

Heatmap(trajectory_matrix)

pD <- ggplot(interaction_counts,
             aes(group, value)) +
      geom_bar(stat="identity") +
      ggtitle("D")
pD

Heatmap(diff_interaction_matrix)

pF <- netAnalysis_signalingRole_heatmap(cellchat_obj)
pF
